title: Coil-built open fruit basket
notes: Wide shallow coil-built bowl with open lattice sides — gaps left between coils rather than blending them, creating a basket visual. Base is solid slab. Coils are laid in a lattice or open-weave pattern on the sides, pressed lightly to the slab base but not blended. Finished approximately 200 mm diameter, 80 mm tall. Decorative (not for wet fruit); suitable for displaying citrus, garlic, or onions.
